title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC are on the latest version
scenario: Language update via Device Settings > Language completes successfully on both earbuds and charge case when already on latest firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with an Osprey device connected (both earbuds and charge case on the latest firmware version).
3. Select any language from the list.
5. Observe the software update screen and wait for the language change to complete.
6. Check the charge case menus to verify they reflect the newly selected language.
expected: The software update screen is displayed, the language change completes successfully, and the charge case menus reflect the new language.
